finding: The clause extending the §3.2 regeneration-determinism contract to the full prompt body overclaims: §3.2 is conditioned on unchanged spec + tasks + diff + findings file, but the maintainability prompt body includes the CLAUDE.md-derived Project Context (§3.4), an input outside that list. Editing CLAUDE.md keeps ids identical while changing the body, falsifying the extended claim — reintroducing the contract-inputs mismatch class settled in rounds 2 and 4.
location: spec/0.23.0.md §5.2 (ordering sentence, final clause) vs §3.2 and §3.4

resolved.evidence: Round-9 revision applied to spec/0.23.0.md §5.2: determinism clause rescoped from full-prompt-body to the ordering of ids and paths, matching §3.2 input preconditions. Same batch also lands the loop-protocol additions born from this round: §8.4 wontfix-clean rule, §16 item 12 tail protocol, delta-pass threshold in §16 item 2, §19/§20 alignment

suggestion: Scope the clause to what the four §3.2 inputs determine: from item ids to the ordering of ids and paths throughout the prompt body.
